missing_text:
Pioneer Women
President David O. McKay
Of the First Presidency

(Delivered at the afternoon session of the Annual Relief Society General Conference held in the Tabernacle, Thursday, October 2, 1947.)

SISTERS, Visiting Brethren, the sweet perfume that radiates from these lovely leis, graciously presented by the President of the Oahu Stake in Hawaii, but typifies the sweet spirit of spirituality that radiates from this large audience of Relief Society workers. When I think of the ideals you represent, as offered in the Relief Societies of the Church—self-improvement, perpetuation and beautification of home, preaching of the gospel of Jesus Christ, service, not only to those in distress but to everyone who needs
notes: The Art 1 file is incorrectly titled 'Christie Lund Coles' but actually contains President McKay's 'Pioneer Women' speech. Christie Lund Coles authored the frontispiece poem 'Snow Upon the Earth'.
